note: Numeric support only; hand derivation is authoritative.

case1.note: dual of the Phase 7 magnetic monopole - electric charge lives in d*F = J, the normal inhomogeneous side

case3.decoupled: charge has no vector potential (oint A_charge = 0); AB has no E-field (oint.oint E_AB.dA = 0) - the two shadows read orthogonal Hodge sectors
case3.regime2_location: harmonic (AB) only; the sourced sector is determined -> no new regime-2
